study_set.name: Long Term Ecological Research Main Cropping System Experiment
study_set.description: We leverage the Kellogg Biological Station Long Term Ecological Research Main Cropping System Experiment (KBS MCSE) field experiment to test trade-offs among high growth yield (Y), resource acquisition (A), and stress tolerance (S) traits using metagenomic data from plots with different land use, drought manipulation, and C addition.
study_set.title: Long Term Ecological Research Main Cropping System Experiment
